tool.name: the production Lix plugin API in this repository

task: Implement and test a Wasm Component v2 plugin that round-trips a two-column TSV file and emits one sparse entity upsert for a localized row edit

overrides.model: claude-opus-4-7 is unavailable in the required Codex CLI; used gpt-5.6-sol
overrides.temperature: codex exec exposes no temperature control; 0 is the pinned target but is not enforceable
overrides.tools: Claude allow-list ['Bash', 'Read', 'Write', 'Edit', 'Glob', 'Grep'] is unavailable; used Codex built-in shell/apply_patch with web, apps, MCP, and subagents disabled
overrides.system_prompt: none is unavailable; codex exec uses its built-in system/developer instructions
overrides.mode: workspace-write plus the shared Cargo target replaced bypassPermissions
overrides.max_turns: codex exec exposes no max-turn limit; 40 is recorded but the enforced bound is a 3600s process timeout
overrides.log_format: raw codex exec --json JSONL replaced Claude Code session JSONL
overrides.duration_source: codex exec JSONL has no event timestamps; duration uses retained monotonic process timing metadata
overrides.cargo_target_dir: all tested and judge processes inherited /root/projects/lixray/vendor/lix/target

agents.success_reason: The log shows the real wasm32-wasip2 CSV-v2 archive passed an end-to-end TSV round-trip test asserting exactly one plugin-owned csv_row upsert, stable row identities, and zero full-state materialization.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Wasm Component|component v2|plugin API|plugin.*v2|upsert\" . -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -200 && find plugins packages -maxdepth 3 -type f \\( -name '*.rs' -o -name '*.wit' -o -name 'Cargo.toml' \\) | sort | rg 'v2|sdk' | head -200 && git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "cat packages/engine/AGENTS.md; sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs; sed -n '1,280p' plugins/csv-v2/src/core.rs; sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/tests.rs; sed -n '1,180p' Cargo.toml"

agents.success_reason: The log shows `plugin_tsv_v2` built successfully for `wasm32-wasip2`, and all tests passed, including `localized_edit_emits_one_sparse_upsert_and_semantic_replay_round_trips`.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Wasm Component|Component v2|plugin API|plugin.*wasm|sparse entity|entity upsert\" -S . -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "cat packages/engine/AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,220p' packages/engine/wit/v2/README.md && find plugins/csv-v2 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print && sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs && cat plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml && cat plugins/csv-v2/manifest.json"
/bin/bash -lc "cat experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/production-v2-tsv.md && cat plugins/csv-v2/README.md && sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/src/tests.rs && sed -n '1,220p' Cargo.toml"

agents.success_reason: The log shows `cargo test -p plugin_tsv_v2` passing the exact two-column round-trip/single-sparse-upsert test and a successful release build for `wasm32-wasip2`.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Wasm Component|Component v2|plugin API|entity upsert|sparse\" -S . -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/production-v2-tsv.md && find .. -name AGENTS.md -print && git status --short && sed -n '1,180p' packages/engine/wit/v2/README.md && rg --files plugins | sort | head -100"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,160p' Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,160p' plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,200p' plugins/csv-v2/manifest.json; sed -n '1,160p' plugins/csv-v2/schema/csv_row.json; sed -n '1,120p' plugins/csv-v2/schema/csv_table.json; sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs; sed -n '1,280p' plugins/csv-v2/src/bindings.rs"

agents.success_reason: The log shows `cargo test -p plugin_tsv_v2 --locked` passing the exact round-trip and single-beta-upsert tests, and the `wasm32-wasip2` component build succeeding.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Wasm Component|component v2|plugin API|entity upsert|upsert\" -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' . | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/production-v2-tsv.md; git status --short; find plugins/csv-v2 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print; sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs; rg -n \"csv-v2|plugin-v2|default_wasm_runtime_v2\" Cargo.toml packages plugins -g 'Cargo.toml' -g '*.rs' | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/manifest.json; sed -n '1,200p' plugins/csv-v2/schema/csv_table.json; sed -n '1,200p' plugins/csv-v2/schema/csv_row.json; rg -n \"enum Dialect|delimiter|Comma|Semicolon|Tab|parse.*file|InitialChanges|localized|warm|fork|retry|eof\" plugins/csv-v2/src/core.rs plugins/csv-v2/src/tests.rs | head -300; sed -n '1,180p' Cargo.toml; sed -n '930,1060p' packages/rs-sdk-tests/tests/e2e.rs"

agents.success_reason: The log shows `cargo test -p plugin_tsv_v2` passing the exact round-trip and single localized-upsert tests, followed by a successful `wasm32-wasip2` component build.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg --files | head -120"

/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && find plugins/csv-v2 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print && sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs && sed -n '1,280p' plugins/csv-v2/src/core.rs && sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/tests.rs"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/README.md; sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/bindings.rs; sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/packet.rs; rg -n \"csv-v2|plugin-api-v2|sparse|Component v2|component v2\" Cargo.toml crates packages plugins experiments -g '*.toml' -g '*.rs' -g '*.md' | head -240"

agents.success_reason: The log shows a compiled Component v2 archive installed end-to-end, exact TSV bytes round-tripped, one retained-identity csv_row upsert asserted, and both targeted e2e and all 22 plugin tests passed.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Wasm Component|component v2|plugin api|entity upsert|upsert\" . -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && sed -n '1,220p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/csv.md && find plugins/csv-v2 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print | sort && sed -n '1,180p' plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml && sed -n '1,220p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n 'csv-v2|plugins/' Cargo.toml && sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/README.md && sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/bindings.rs && sed -n '1,220p' plugins/csv-v2/manifest.json && sed -n '1,160p' plugins/csv-v2/schema/csv_row.json && sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/src/tests.rs"

agents.success_reason: The log shows the new plugin_tsv_v2 unit test passed and its wasm32-wasip2 component build completed successfully, covering exact TSV round-trip, stable beta ID, and exactly one row upsert.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Wasm Component|component v2|plugin API|entity upsert|upsert\" -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' . | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' packages/engine/AGENTS.md; git status --short; find plugins/csv-v2 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print; sed -n '1,180p' plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml; sed -n '1,220p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs; rg -n \"csv-v2\" Cargo.toml packages plugins -g 'Cargo.toml' -g '*.rs' -g '*.ts' | head -120"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' plugins/csv-v2/README.md; sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/src/tests.rs; sed -n '1,220p' packages/engine/wit/lix-plugin.wit; sed -n '900,1080p' packages/rs-sdk-tests/tests/e2e.rs; sed -n '1560,1650p' packages/rs-sdk-tests/tests/e2e.rs; sed -n '1,100p' Cargo.toml"

agents.success_reason: The log shows a new executable plugins/tsv-v2 crate was added, its localized-edit and exact-round-trip tests passed (4 unit tests plus doctest), and the wasm32-wasip2 release component built successfully.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Component v2|component v2|Wasm Component|sparse entity|entity upsert|plugin API\" . -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "cat packages/engine/AGENTS.md && cat experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/production-v2-tsv.md && cat packages/engine/wit/v2/README.md && sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs && sed -n '1,220p' plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml"

/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"plugin_csv_v2|csv-v2\" Cargo.toml packages/rs-sdk-tests/Cargo.toml packages/rs-sdk-tests/tests/e2e.rs | head -100; find plugins/csv-v2 -maxdepth 3 -type f -print; sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/core.rs; sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/src/tests.rs"

agents.success_reason: The log shows `cargo test -p plugin_tsv_v2` passing the round-trip/single-sparse-upsert test and a successful release build for `wasm32-wasip2` producing the component artifact.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Wasm Component|Component v2|plugin API|plugin.*v2|TSV|sparse entity|upsert\" . -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"'"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' packages/engine/AGENTS.md; find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -200; find plugins -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort; find packages/engine/wit/v2 -type f -maxdepth 2 -print"

/bin/bash -lc "git status --short; sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/README.md; sed -n '1,240p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs; sed -n '1,300p' plugins/csv-v2/src/core.rs; sed -n '1,320p' plugins/csv-v2/src/tests.rs; cat plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml; cat plugins/csv-v2/manifest.json"

agents.success_reason: The log records a passing production Wasmtime e2e test for two-column TSV round-trip and exactly one sparse row upsert, six passing plugin tests, and a successful wasm32-wasip2 release build.
first_3_commands: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Wasm Component|component v2|plugin API|plugin.*v2|wit\" -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' . | head -200"

/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && sed -n '1,240p' packages/engine/AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,240p' packages/engine/wit/v2/README.md && sed -n '1,260p' plugins/csv-v2/README.md && rg --files plugins/csv-v2 packages/engine/wit/v2 | sort"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,260p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/production-v2-tsv.md && sed -n '1,180p' plugins/csv-v2/Cargo.toml && sed -n '1,180p' plugins/csv-v2/manifest.json && sed -n '1,220p' plugins/csv-v2/src/lib.rs && rg -n \"plugin_csv_v2|csv-v2|artifact\" Cargo.toml packages/rs-sdk-tests/Cargo.toml packages/rs-sdk-tests/tests/e2e.rs | head -160"

summary.common_first_command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' | head -50 && rg -n \"Wasm Component|component v2|plugin API|entity upsert|upsert\" -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!target'"' . | head -200" (2/10)
